👧🏻
聽過 · Heard
「為什麼你不可以像你兄弟姊妹那樣？」
Why can't you be more like your siblings?
💔
聽過 · Heard
「我不想要你這個女／兒」
I don't want you as my daughter / son.
🔒
聽過 · Heard
「無人可以幫你，除了你自己」
No one can help you but yourself.
📚
聽過 · Heard
「為什麼你那麼蠢？」
Why are you so stupid?
🤕
聽過 · Heard
「哭有什麼用？你令我很失禮」
What's the point of crying? You embarrass me.
🚪
聽過 · Heard
「我生你養你，你就是這樣對我」
I raised you, and this is how you treat me?
😮‍💨
聽過 · Heard
「你身在福中不知足，我成長時都沒有這些資源」
You don't know how lucky you are — I grew up with nothing.
🌸
聽過 · Heard
「我都是為你好，你未來就會感謝我」
Everything I do is for your own good — you'll thank me one day.
🌀
聽過 · Heard
「為什麼你這麼慢？一點小事都做不好，將來要在社會上怎麼生存？」
Why are you so slow? You can't do anything right — how will you survive in this world?
✦ @surrender.diaries ✦
這些話，對你做了什麼？
What have these words done to you?
0
個你帶著的模式· patterns you've been carrying
0 ✓
👧🏻
「為什麼你不可以像你兄弟姊妹那樣？」
Why can't you be more like your siblings?
你學會了：永遠不夠好，連家人都是你的標準。

You learned: you're never enough — even family sets the standard.
0 ✓
💔
「我不想要你這個女／兒」
I don't want you as my daughter / son.
你學會了：存在本身需要被證明，拼命討好才有價值。

You learned: your existence needs to be earned.
0 ✓
🔒
「無人可以幫你，除了你自己」
No one can help you but yourself.
你學會了：不敢求助，過度獨立，一個人扛所有。

You learned: never to ask for help.
0 ✓
📚
「為什麼你那麼蠢？」
Why are you so stupid?
你學會了：智力和能力都不可信任，犯錯是危險的，開口之前先懷疑自己。

You learned: your intelligence can't be trusted, mistakes are dangerous, and you should doubt yourself before you even speak.
0 ✓
🤕
「哭有什麼用？你令我很失禮」
What's the point of crying? You embarrass me.
你學會了：情緒是弱點，眼淚是羞恥，做自己令別人難堪。

You learned: emotions are weakness, tears are shame, and being yourself is a burden to others.
0 ✓
🚪
「我生你養你，你就是這樣對我」
I raised you, and this is how you treat me?
你學會了：愛是有債的，感恩要用順從來還。

You learned: love is a debt, and obedience is how you repay it.
0 ✓
😮‍💨
「你身在福中不知足，我成長時都沒有這些資源」
You don't know how lucky you are — I grew up with nothing.
你學會了：壓抑真實感受，用「應該感恩」封鎖情緒，自己的需要永遠排最後。

You learned: to silence your feelings with gratitude, and to always put your own needs last.
0 ✓
🌸
「我都是為你好，你未來就會感謝我」
Everything I do is for your own good — you'll thank me one day.
愛和控制穿同一件衫——你的感受被告知「以後你就會明白」，卻從沒被允許當下說不。

Love and control looked the same — your feelings were deferred to the future, never valid in the present.
0 ✓
🌀
「為什麼你這麼慢？一點小事都做不好，將來要在社會上怎麼生存？」
Why are you so slow? You can't do anything right — how will you survive?
你學會了：不斷催促自己，永遠不夠快、不夠好，對未來充滿恐懼。

You learned: to constantly rush yourself, never fast enough, never good enough, always afraid of the future.
你不需要再獨自承受這一切
You don't have to keep carrying this alone.
一對一希塔療癒 · 一個完全屬於你的空間
1:1 ThetaHealing · A space that's entirely yours
幫亞洲家庭長大的你，從控制走向臣服
